Non-discrimination and anti-retaliation trainings for all supervisors and employees is highly encouraged. Trainings should review how to prevent discrimination and harassment and how to properly report it. Companies should emphasize that discrimination against applicants and employees based on gender, sexual orientation, race and/or religion will not be tolerated.
